column1: Download ATTENTION Expert Bundle Unzip it, go to the Tor directory and run tor.exe.
After a few seconds it will come to 100% Done - close this window and go further according to the manual.
Now you can specify the socket in jabber (you can also specify it in the browser if you want).
Name Any name, you can put in a login, click
Add XMMP address - this is the login (along with the domain)
Authenticate in clear text - If the connection is encrypted
In the certificate warning, click Trust.
Then it will say that the profile is incomplete,
so enter only one field, NIC.
in your login (for example, if your login is asd@dfg.ru, your NIC will be asd),
do not make up your own nicknames, otherwise you will get confused.
